layoutRegions.name: receipt-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Track receipt volume, acknowledgement rate, failed retries, and checksum drift.

layoutRegions.name: delivery-packet-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare exported review packets by destination, receipt id, status, and delivery progress.

layoutRegions.name: receipt-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect destination acknowledgements, failed retries, checksum drift, closeout notes, escalations, and rollback evidence.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact receipt counter with semantic status tone.

components.name: DeliveryCard
components.purpose: Exported review packet card showing destination receipt status and delivery progress.
interactions: status chip maps to receipt state

components.name: ReceiptRow
components.purpose: Destination acknowledgement row with lane, age, receipt state, and rollback evidence context.
interactions: receipt state remains readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
